title: (Monday Dev) Burndown Chart should only apply to the Board in play, not the entire Sprint
excerpt: I have multiple teams (each with their own Task Board) connected to the same Sprint Board and Sprint Schedule. When they open up the Burndown chart using the Burndown button (Monday Dev feature), it will show the burndow…

posts.author: taylortaylor (Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have multiple teams (each with their own Task Board) connected to the same Sprint Board and Sprint Schedule. When they open up the Burndown chart using the Burndown button (Monday Dev feature), it will show the burndown for all items in all the other boards.

I’d like if we could limit the burndown chart to just the active Board’s items, or give the settings option to do so.
